---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Propose a new page feature, custom component slider, or automated sandbox responder to our project backlog
title: "[FEAT] <Short description of feature request>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? 🤨
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. *"I'm frustrated when rating teachers isn't saved inside dashboard class completion logs"*).

## Describe the Proposed Feature 💡
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Add any architectural designs or state sync logic references.

## Feature Implementation Idea 🛠️
How would you build this? Mention components, contexts (`AuthContext.tsx`), or pages where changes will be introduced.

## Additional Context 📸
Add any other mockup drawings, visual examples, or details about the feature request here.
